[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 001011111 6
4 100111101 6
5 011101111 7
6 111110100 6
7 111111110 8

01 10 111100111 7
12 21 111110111 8
23 32 100111111 7
34 43 111111111 a match 0 1 2
45 54 111110110 7
56 65 111010110 6
67 76 100011111 6
70 07 110111011 7

13 31 111101111 8
24 42 111110101 7
35 53 111101111 8

57 75 011011011 6

71 17 111111111 a match 0 1 2

25 52 111010011 6
